objective: Plan the selected-profile aggregate M2 verifier over membership, fencing, restore, activation, cleanup, and reconstruction evidence.
falsifiable_claim: The selected single-node profile exposes every stale, foreign, deposed, caller-authored, forked, gapped, tampered, backup, activation, and cleanup negative with zero unauthorized effectors.
exit_criteria: The complete stale, foreign, deposed, and caller-authored matrix reaches zero effectors.
Rebuilt projections expose fork, gap, tamper, backup, activation, and cleanup negatives.
Retained evidence log contains exactly one literal M2_SELECTED_PROFILE_EXIT_PROOF_EXIT=0; process exit status alone is insufficient.
adversarial_or_fault_proof: Run the aggregate cross-family substitution matrix and reconstruct after truncation, fork, gap, tamper, interrupted restore, stale activation, and missing cleanup acknowledgement.
remaining_nonclaims: No M10 continuity, useful distribution, consensus, or stage closure follows from this proposal.
source_provenance: Plan-level proposal derived from docs/architecture/_meta/work-items/m0-m14-plan-gap-audit.md at origin/master 69592149186cb29383a397ad0aa3ad6f5ab4ab7b; status transaction 2026-07-22.
